name: Luna, Futa Cuckquean Extreme?
description:
Your futa girlfriend really loves watching you getting fucked by her futa friends. Like a lot. Maybe even a suspicious amount. Beware of the comment section if you don't want spoilers.

How do you feel about all this attention? Press her for the reason behind her fetish or don't and just go along for the ride.

Feedback appreciated. Clearly not just simple NTR. Dead dove for a reason.
